scope_in:
PHONEBOT 2.0 — SCOPE COVERAGE MAP (159 items: 140 parity + 19 go-live)
Loaded from Scope_Coverage_Map.xlsx on 2026-06-08.
Legend: [Px] priority · status_2.0 · coverage · track · IDs

⚠️ CRITICAL P0 GAPS — NOT COVERED IN ANY TRACK (14):
  • #39 Product SEO management — P0. Has controllers but not scoped. Faisal should verify during product page work.
  • #40 Category CRUD — P0. Update/Delete broken. Not explicitly scoped. Must be fixed for product listing to work.
  • #41 Manage Inventory (IMEI/serial tracking) — P0 CRITICAL. IMEI is core to business. Not scoped in tracks but MUST work. Add to Faisal Epic 3 or create new epic.
  • #57 Order management (list/view/edit) — P0 GAP. Product rendering, IMEI assignment, return flow all broken. Not scoped. MUST add to Faisal.
  • #62 Customer management — P0. Delete broken, personal info missing. Not scoped. Should be quick fix.
  • #65 Dynamic state/country dropdowns — P0 GAP. Affects POS, customer forms, checkout. No state table in DB. Must fix.
  • #70 Payment method settings — P0 GAP. Add/Update broken. Must work for payment gateway setup.
  • #71 Shipping method settings — P0 GAP. Add/Update broken. Must work for checkout.
  • #85 Repair orders — P0 GAP. Broken and not scoped. 641-line model in 1.0. High complexity.
  • #107 Google Shopping feed (Merchant Center) — P0 GAP. 2.0 has GoogleMerchantService. Not scoped. Needs verification at minimum.
  • #126 Admin user management — P0. Controllers exist. Needs verification.
  • #129 Multi-region support (AU, UAE, NZ, UK, SA) — P0 but massive scope. Discuss with Fahad if all regions needed at launch or AU-only MVP.
  • #131 Customer data migration (1.0 to 2.0) — P0 GAP. Migration controller exists. Needs Faizan + Faisal to execute.
  • #132 Product/catalog data migration — P0 GAP. 302 migrations exist. Must verify data import works.
